raw_messages.content:
# Current Date Context
The current date is 2024-05-15 (Wednesday). When users mention dates without specifying the year, always assume they refer to 2024. All flight searches and reservations should use 2024 dates unless explicitly stated otherwise.
I need to make some changes to my upcoming flight from New York to Chicago. Can you assist with that?

Of course! Could you please provide me with more details about the changes you'd like to make, such as the reservation ID, the new cabin class, or any changes to the passengers or flights? If you're not sure, I can fetch the current details of your reservation.
Sure, I want to change the passenger to myself, upgrade to economy class, and have 3 checked bags. I prefer to pay with a gift card. Can you help with that?
